taskTemplate.name: Credit Score Disclosure
taskTemplate.description: Quality review and delivery of Credit Score Disclosure

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act All Scores
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act All Scores – All scores for all borrowers from all credit bureaus pulled on the credit report are evidenced on the FACT Act Disclosure (be sure to check second borrower pair as well)
subTaskTemplate.type: Credit Score Disclosure – FACT Act All Scores

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Checkboxes
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Checkboxes – Ensure the Material Terms of Credit set by Credit Score and Credit Score for Disclosure Notice check boxes on the Disclosure Notice are checked when a credit score is available and unchecked when a score is not available
subTaskTemplate.type: Credit Score Disclosure – FACT Act Checkboxes

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Key Factors
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Key Factors – Verify that the Key Factors informational text is present for every credit score to be disclosed for all borrowers and all bureaus pulled
subTaskTemplate.type: Credit Score Disclosure – FACT Act Key Factors

subTaskTemplate.name: eConsent
subTaskTemplate.description: eConsent – Verify eConsent is received before sending electronically

subTaskTemplate.name: Contact Info
subTaskTemplate.description: Contact Info – Verify email and phone are present before sending electronically

subTaskTemplate.name: Ready to Send
subTaskTemplate.description: Ready to Send – Mark Done to send disclosure electronically; mark Issue to send via mail (must complete manually)
subTaskTemplate.type: Credit Score Disclosure – Ready to Send
